arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou gives Micky van de Ven update and fires back at Leyton Orient boss Richie Wellens
arts.sum: It’s a big game and hopefully a positive result and then over the next couple of weeks we’ll get some significant players back, which I think will help." Ange Postecoglou has given a further update on Micky van de Ven and explained which Tottenham players should be back from injury next week as well as firing back at Leyton Orient boss Richie Wellens.

arts.ttl: What Unai Emery told Donyell Malen after leaving him out of Villa's Champions League squad
arts.sum: Unai Emery admits it wasn't easy for him to tell Donyell Malen that he had been left out of Aston Villa's Champions League squad for the knockout rounds. Villa signed five players in the winter window, starting with Malen and Andres Garcia for a combined £26m.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou responds to injury jibe from League One boss in brutal fashion
arts.sum: Tottenham take on Leyton Orient in the FA Cup clash this weekend with Ange Postecoglou responding to Richie Wellens - who joked about the amount of injuries he's struggling with

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou insists Tottenham's season would NOT be over with FA Cup defeat
arts.sum: Spurs boss claims getting the sack “doesn’t enter my head space” before Sunday's visit to Aston Villa after humiliating Carabao Cup exit at Anfield

arts.ttl: Speculation over my Tottenham future ‘doesn’t enter my head’ – Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: Spurs will aim to bounce back from Thursday’s abject Carabao Cup defeat at Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Tottenham: Ange Postecoglou responds after Leyton Orient boss Richie Wellens apologies for comments
arts.sum: O’s coach joked Spurs counterpart used injuries as an excuse

arts.ttl: Tottenham manager Ange Postecoglou makes Micky van de Ven fitness admission
arts.sum: Dutchman will not be rushed back into action despite brief return

arts.ttl: How Marcus Rashford made perfect Aston Villa start as Unai Emery reveals plan for Man United loanee
arts.sum: “I want the players thinking 70 per cent football, 70 per cent in life every day,” Emery said when asked about the demands he has set his whole squad. “The process we had before with the players joining us is to try and support them, helping progressively to feel confident and comfortable in our structure because we are very demanding, tactically, how we want to play.

arts.ttl: Challenge with Rashford at Villa is huge - Emery
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery says he faces a "huge challenge" to help revive Marcus Rashford's career, but is ready to "exploit" the on-loan striker's potential.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal target England international wanted by Tottenham Hotspur and Newcastle United
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly preparing to make a move for Crystal Palace captain Marc Guehi in the summer transfer window, as Mikel Arteta looks to further strengthen his defensive options ahead of next season. With the Gunners competing on multiple fronts, Arteta is keen to add depth to his backline.
